name: diy-inventory
description: A self-hosted, AI-powered hardware inventory system for makers, hobbyists, and electronics enthusiasts. Track your components, identify parts from photos, and let AI generate project ideas from your actual stock.

scripts.validate:i18n: node -e "const en=require('./assets/locales/en.json');const langs=['he','es'];let ok=true;function keys(o,p=''){return Object.entries(o).flatMap(([k,v])=>typeof v==='object'?keys(v,p?p+'.'+k:k):[p?p+'.'+k:k]);}const enKeys=keys(en);langs.forEach(l=>{try{const t=require('./assets/locales/'+l+'.json');const miss=enKeys.filter(k=>keys(t).indexOf(k)<0);if(miss.length){console.error('\u274c '+l+'.json missing '+miss.length+' keys:\n  '+miss.join('\n  '));ok=false;}else console.log('\u2705 '+l+'.json: '+enKeys.length+'/'+enKeys.length+' keys (100%)');}catch(e){console.error('\u274c Cannot load '+l+'.json: '+e.message);ok=false;}});if(!ok)process.exit(1);"

author: Philip Sandler <https://github.com/Philusha1983>
